title: acoridium loheri
intro: Acoridium loheri, also known as the Filipino or Philippine acoridium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. The medicinal properties of Acoridium loheri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are often used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Acoridium loheri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Acoridium loheri can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used in folk medicine in the Philippines.
